title: 📰 Aave V3 USDC pool stuck at 99.87% utilization with under $3M left as Circle pushes urgent fix
message: Aave's flagship USDC market is effectively drained, leaving lenders unable to withdraw and triggering Circle to demand emergency rate action.

title: 📰 April DeFi exploits hit $620M as Kelp DAO contagion drains $6.4B from TVL
message: April crypto exploits crossed $620M after Kelp DAO's $292M rsETH bridge drain dragged total DeFi TVL from $26.4B to roughly $20B.

title: 📰 BTC stalls at $80K wall as $5B USDT print and ETF inflows fail to clear resistance
message: Bitcoin failed to break $80,000 as concentrated sell orders capped gains despite strong ETF inflows and fresh stablecoin liquidity.

title: 📰 BTC reclaims $79K as Iran peace proposal flips Fear & Greed from 33 to 47
message: Bitcoin pushed back to $79,124 Monday as a weekend Iran peace proposal lifted risk appetite ahead of this week's Fed meeting.

title: 📰 Bitcoin stalls at $80K as $5B USDT liquidity meets oil-driven selloff
message: BTC reversed from $79,500 Monday as a fresh oil surge triggered a broader crypto pullback, capping a four-week run that delivered its best monthly gains in a year.

title: 📰 Bitcoin 2026 opens in Vegas with FBI's Patel, acting AG Blanche keynoting Day 1
message: The world's largest Bitcoin conference kicks off Monday in Las Vegas with a federal law enforcement headline panel framing code as free speech.

title: 📰 Aave coalition raises ~80% of $200M needed to plug Kelp DAO bad debt
message: Aave-led DeFi consortium has secured roughly $160M of the $200M shortfall left by the April 19 Kelp DAO exploit, easing systemic contagion fears.

title: 📰 Clarity Act faces Memorial Day cliff as 100+ crypto firms storm Senate
message: A coalition of over 100 crypto firms is pressing Senate Banking to mark up the Clarity Act before a May 25 cutoff for 2026 passage.

title: 📰 Bitcoin clears $77K, on pace for best month in a year as $5B USDT mints fuel rebound
message: BTC trades above $77,000 and is up over 13% in April, its strongest monthly run in a year, supported by $5 billion in fresh USDT supply.

title: 📰 Kalshi launches crypto perpetual futures today under codename 'Timeless'
message: Prediction-market giant Kalshi rolls out perp futures on a handful of cryptocurrencies today, marking its first true derivatives push beyond event contracts.

title: 📰 Aave hits 80% of $200M Kelp DAO bailout — Mantle, Aave DAO put up $127M
message: Aave's recovery fund has raised nearly 80% of the $200M needed to cover bad debt left by the Kelp DAO exploit, led by Mantle and Aave DAO contributions.

title: 📰 Lazarus Group fingered in $620M April hack wave — Drift and Kelp DAO drove 95%
message: April crypto theft hits roughly $620M, with two North Korea-linked exploits accounting for about $577M of the stolen funds.

title: 📰 SEC and CFTC officially label BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP and LINK as digital commodities
message: A joint SEC-CFTC interpretation classifies the five biggest tokens as commodities and lays out a unified taxonomy for stablecoins, collectibles and digital securities.

title: 📰 Hyperliquid whales flip aggressively long on BTC even as funding stays deeply negative
message: Large Hyperliquid traders have moved from net short to their most net-long BTC positioning since early March, despite persistently negative funding rates.

title: 📰 Trump team prepping public release of Strategic Bitcoin Reserve architecture
message: The Trump administration is finalizing the detailed framework for a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, including how Treasury would accumulate, custody, and report on BTC holdings.

title: 📰 April hacks hit $620M in 20 days — worst month since Bybit's Feb '25 breach
message: Crypto protocols have lost $620M to hacks and exploits in the first 20 days of April, eclipsing Q1 2026 combined.

title: 📰 Bitcoin-USD correlation hits -0.90, most negative since 2022
message: BTC's 30-day correlation with the U.S. Dollar Index has flipped to -0.90, the deepest inverse reading in nearly four years.

title: 📰 Schwab opens spot BTC and ETH trading to retail brokerage clients
message: Charles Schwab flipped the switch on direct spot Bitcoin and Ethereum trading inside its retail brokerage, the deepest TradFi push into crypto since the ETFs.

title: 📰 SEC and CFTC sign historic MOU, ending years of jurisdictional turf war
message: The SEC and CFTC announced their first formal memorandum of understanding to coordinate crypto oversight, codifying a joint interpretation issued earlier this spring.

title: 📰 Bitcoin tracks best month in a year as USDT supply nears $150B
message: BTC trades near $78,060, up 13% in April, on pace for its strongest monthly close since spring 2025 as USDT supply expands $5B.

title: 📰 North Korea Lazarus Linked to $292M Kelp Drain as April Losses Top $606M
message: Forensics tie North Korea's Lazarus Group to the $292M KelpDAO drain, capping crypto's worst hack month since February 2025's Bybit breach.

title: 📰 100+ Crypto Firms Press Senate to Mark Up Clarity Act Market Structure Bill
message: A coalition of more than 100 crypto firms led by Coinbase and Ripple is urging the Senate Banking Committee to advance the Clarity Act this spring.

title: 📰 KelpDAO LayerZero Bridge Drained for $292M, Wrapping 18% of rsETH Across 20 Chains
message: An attacker exploited KelpDAO's LayerZero-powered bridge to siphon roughly 116,500 rsETH — about $292M and 18% of circulating supply.

title: 📰 North Korea Pinned for $285M Drift Hack via Long-Game Social Engineering
message: Investigators traced April's $285M Drift Protocol drain to DPRK-affiliated operators using pre-signed authorizations harvested over months.

title: 📰 April Crypto Hack Toll Hits $606M, Worst Month Since Bybit Breach
message: Crypto protocols lost $606M across 12 exploits in the first 18 days of April, the worst monthly theft tally since February 2025's Bybit incident.

title: 📰 Bitcoin Posts Best Month in a Year as $5B USDT Injection Pushes BTC Above $77K
message: Bitcoin is up 13.6% in April and on pace for its strongest monthly close since early 2025, with Tether minting $5B in fresh USDT to refuel the rally.

title: 📰 Lazarus-Linked April Hacks Cross $606M, Worst Crypto Theft Month Since Bybit
message: Crypto protocols have lost over $606 million to exploits in 18 days, the worst month since Bybit's $1.4B breach.

title: 📰 BlackRock IBIT Options Top Deribit, Marking Wall Street's Crypto Derivatives Takeover
message: BlackRock's IBIT bitcoin ETF options surpassed Deribit in open interest, signaling regulated U.S. derivatives are eclipsing offshore venues for institutional hedging.

title: 📰 100+ Crypto Firms Pressure Senate to Mark Up Clarity Act or Risk Enforcement Revival
message: A coalition led by Coinbase and Ripple sent a letter demanding the Senate Banking Committee advance the Clarity Act market-structure bill immediately.

title: 📰 Bitcoin Stalls Below $80K as Pentagon-Backed Inflation Warning Flips Risk Mood
message: BTC's push toward $80,000 stalled at $77.8K as rising oil and Strait of Hormuz risk reignited inflation fears across risk assets.
